scenarios.name: Normal Operation
scenarios.headline: Balanced steady-state orchestration
scenarios.summary: HyperStack operates in a high-autonomy, margin-stable mode with synchronized telemetry, optimization, dispatch, and settlement.
scenarios.narrative: A benchmark operating day with strong visibility, low latency, and efficient value capture.
scenarios.investorSignal: Demonstrates recurring operational discipline and healthy unit economics.

timeline.title: Telemetry synchronized
timeline.message: Physical sites stream synchronized asset and thermal telemetry into AIMEPS.

timeline.title: Optimization envelope issued
timeline.message: AIMEPS publishes a demand forecast and optimized dispatch envelope through GTL-Link to ASHS.

timeline.title: Control loop executed
timeline.message: ASHS executes balancing policy and downstream control with minimal reserve consumption.

timeline.title: Financial update posted
timeline.message: Financial protocol posts realized margin and EOP updates the executive view.

scenarios.name: Black Start
scenarios.headline: Resilience-led recovery orchestration
scenarios.summary: HyperStack detects disturbance conditions, prioritizes critical load restoration, and synchronizes reserve finance during staged recovery.
scenarios.narrative: A stress scenario that highlights fast detection, autonomous recovery, and capital-protective control.
scenarios.investorSignal: Shows system resilience, recovery confidence, and downside containment during infrastructure stress.

timeline.title: Disturbance detected
timeline.message: AIMEPS detects a cascading availability drop and escalates to ASHS recovery mode.

timeline.title: Recovery policy synthesized
timeline.message: ASHS generates a black-start sequence and pushes restoration controls into the field.

timeline.title: Reserve finance aligned
timeline.message: Contingency reserve coverage and restoration progress are posted to the executive layer.

scenarios.name: Peak Load
scenarios.headline: Throughput-first demand response
scenarios.summary: Demand volatility is transformed into a coordinated dispatch strategy across energy, compute, and financial incentives.
scenarios.narrative: A high-demand window that proves HyperStack can increase throughput while preserving margin discipline.
scenarios.investorSignal: Highlights revenue capture under demand pressure and the ability to monetize flexibility.

timeline.title: Peak crest forecast
timeline.message: AIMEPS forecasts a demand crest and packages flexibility signals for ASHS.

timeline.title: Capacity reallocated
timeline.message: ASHS reprioritizes dispatch and compute loads to widen the operating envelope.

timeline.title: Peak value monetized
timeline.message: Financial protocol books dynamic peak incentives and EOP surfaces revenue posture.

scenarios.name: KPI Settlement
scenarios.headline: Operational proof to financial trust
scenarios.summary: Verified operating results flow into settlement logic, investor reporting, and incentive distribution.
scenarios.narrative: A finance-forward close process showing how HyperStack turns performance into auditable economic value.
scenarios.investorSignal: Demonstrates auditability, payout readiness, and institutional-grade reporting discipline.

timeline.title: Performance proof assembled
timeline.message: Verified operational outcomes are assembled into a settlement-ready proof package.

timeline.title: Settlement waterfall executed
timeline.message: Financial protocol calculates payouts, reserve coverage, and incentive distribution.

timeline.title: Investor reporting published
timeline.message: EOP publishes the investor-ready reporting package with full audit readiness.
